content:
A great idea in unclear English raises nothing. This workshop rebuilds your pitch around the questions global investors actually ask, and trains you to answer them without hedging, filler, or losing the room.

## What you'll learn
- Telling your company story in 90 confident seconds: traction, thesis, and team
- Answering hard questions on unit economics, competition, and risk without deflecting
- Talking numbers clearly (revenue, margins, runway) without drowning in jargon
- Controlling the room during Q&A so the conversation stays on your strongest ground

## Who it's for
Founders, CFOs, and executives preparing for international fundraising or strategic partnership pitches.
title: Pitching to International Investors
